# cirro_project (Data Source)

Fetches details of a Cirro project by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Project identifier.

### Read-Only

- `account` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--account))
- `billing_account_id` (String)
- `classification_ids` (List of String)
- `contacts` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--contacts))
- `description` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `organization` (String)
- `settings` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--settings))
- `status` (String)
- `tags` (List of String)

<a id="nestedatt--account"></a>
### Nested Schema for `account`

Read-Only:

- `account_id` (String)
- `account_name` (String)
- `account_type` (String)
- `region_name` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--contacts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `contacts`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `organization` (String)
- `phone` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `settings`

Read-Only:

- `budget_amount` (Number)
- `budget_period` (String)
- `enable_backup` (Boolean)
- `enable_sftp` (Boolean)
- `kms_arn` (String)
- `retention_policy_days` (Number)
- `service_connections` (List of String)
- `temporary_storage_lifetime_days` (Number)
- `vpc_id` (String)
